behavioral_metrics.release_cadence: daily CalVer (v2026.5.x), multiple releases per day on active days
behavioral_metrics.notes: fork-to-star ratio 20.6% is STRONG signal of active usage (threshold: 5%)

architecture.description: Single persistent gateway process routes all inbound channel messages to per-agent session runners. Plugins extend core via typed SDK seams. Agents have isolated sessions, transcripts, and capability stores. ACP (Agent Control Protocol) handles inter-agent communication.
key_subsystems: src/agents/ -- agent lifecycle, subagent spawning, depth/capability tracking
src/tasks/ -- SQLite-backed task registry with delivery and notify policy
src/commitments/ -- LLM-extracted promise tracking with heartbeat delivery
src/trajectory/ -- unified session trace schema (runtime + transcript events)
src/daemon/ -- launchd/systemd service management, service audit, restart handoff
src/acp/ -- Agent Control Protocol for inter-agent session communication
src/memory/ -- pluggable memory slot (one active at a time)
src/sessions/ -- session lifecycle, transcript management, session-id resolution
src/cron/ -- cron job scheduling with isolated runs and delivery

feature_inventory.detail: Full interface: bootstrap, maintain, ingest, ingestBatch, afterTurn, assemble, compact, prepareSubagentSpawn, onSubagentEnded, dispose. Token-budget-aware assembly. Safe transcript rewrite via runtime callback. Background vs foreground turn maintenance mode.

feature_inventory.feature: SQLite-backed task registry with delivery/notify policy
feature_inventory.detail: TaskRecord with status (queued/running/succeeded/failed/timed_out/cancelled/lost), TaskDeliveryStatus, TaskNotifyPolicy (done_only/state_changes/silent), parentFlowId/parentTaskId for tree, terminalSummary, progressSummary. task-flow-registry for multi-step flows.

LLM-extracted promises from conversation (event_check_in, deadline_check, care_check_in, open_loop). Due windows with timezone. Dedup key. Confidence score. Source: inferred_user_context or agent_promise. Heartbeat delivery via e2e test (commitments-heartbeat-policy.e2e.test.ts).
Three roles: main, orchestrator, leaf. Control scope: children or none. Spawn depth tracked per-session in store. Depth resolution follows spawnedBy chain for inherited depth.

feature_inventory.feature: ACP (Agent Control Protocol) for inter-agent communication
feature_inventory.detail: ACP handles session-mode and run-mode spawning. Parent stream relay (acp-spawn-parent-stream.ts). Session-interaction-mode. Persistent bindings for long-lived agent relationships.

TrajectoryEvent with traceSchema, traceId, source (runtime|transcript|export), type, ts, seq, sessionId, sessionKey, runId, workspaceDir, provider, modelId. TrajectoryBundleManifest for export. Supports cleanup, export, metadata.

feature_inventory.feature: Launchd/systemd service audit with typed issue codes
feature_inventory.detail: SERVICE_AUDIT_CODES: gatewayCommandMissing, gatewayEntrypointMismatch, gatewayPathMissing, gatewayTokenEmbedded, gatewayPortMismatch, gatewayRuntimeBun, gatewayRuntimeNodeVersionManager, launchdKeepAlive, systemdAfterNetworkOnline, etc. ServiceConfigAudit {ok, issues[]} returned from audit.

scheduleDetachedLaunchdRestartHandoff: spawns a detached /bin/sh child that waits for the current process PID to exit, then kickstarts or bootstraps the launchd service. Handles kickstart + bootstrap fallback. Unref'd so parent can exit cleanly.
Doctor --fix repairs: bad cron model overrides, token drift, stale binary paths, node runtime migration. SERVICE_AUDIT_CODES drive what doctor can auto-repair.

feature_inventory.feature: Graduated crash recovery ladder for gateway
feature_inventory.detail: Feature request (not yet shipped): graduated recovery ladder -- restart, config rollback, safe-mode, factory reset.

ContextEnginePromptCacheInfo: retention, lastCallUsage, observation (broke, previousCacheRead, changes), lastCacheTouchAt, expiresAt. ContextEnginePromptCacheObservationChange codes: cacheRetention, model, streamStrategy, systemPrompt, tools, transport.

resolveSpawnedWorkspaceInheritance: explicit workspace override, then target-agent workspace, then requester workspace. Cross-agent spawns use target agent's workspace. resolveIngressWorkspaceOverrideForSpawnedRun for spawn chain.
Feature request: hooks that run after openclaw updates itself.
Feature request: use an LLM to reason about whether to approve a tool exec call, not just rule-based allow/deny.
Feature request: require explicit operator approval before auto-upgrading.

deployment_model.cloud_options: fly.toml + render.yaml (fly.io and Render deployment configs present)
